name: com.synder/gl-importer-mcp
description: Import CSV/XLSX accounting data into QuickBooks Online or Xero via the Synder Importer API.

environmentVariables.name: IMPORTER_API_TOKEN
environmentVariables.description: Bearer token for the Synder Importer API. Generate at importer.synder.com -> Account -> API Keys.

environmentVariables.name: IMPORTER_BASE_URL
environmentVariables.description: Override API base URL (for staging/test). Defaults to https://importer.synder.com/api/v1.
